text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I am an Umamusume of the Mejiro family... And
like the others, that's been a biiig part of my life
since I was little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
We were raised listening to wonderful
stories—tales of our older Mejiro sisters' exploits.
They were the stuff of dreams and legends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Down Mount Yotei and through heavy snow, our
founder trekked.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thus, awoke the "mother mountain," and the
earth was saturated with love, giving birth to the
"giants."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At last, all her children opened their eyes for the
first time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro Umamusume ran, swift as the wind
across grassy fields, valleys of flowers, deserts,
and snowy plains. Until...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They ran in races, where they stirred the hearts of
many with excitement and emotion, bringing
smiles to their faces.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Like so, the Mejiro Umamusume had become
children of light, admired by all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(And this is why we've always dreamed that
someday we, too, would become wonderful big
sisters like they were.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(For if we are all children of light, then each of us
should harbor that Mejiro glimmer.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(That is what our dear, esteemed grandmother
told us.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Of course, each one of you excels in a different
manner.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
If you wish to build upon the Mejiro name, you
must capitalize on what makes you strong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
McQueen, you are to run in long-distance races.
Ryan, you must polish your movements.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text:
Ardan, steel that firm resolve of yours. Palmer,
refine your willpower.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text: Dober, embolden your heart. And Bright...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Yes, Grandmother? What should I do?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text: You... must watch everyone closely.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I must... watch? Oh... Is that all?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Grandmother
text_block_list.text: That is all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(I believe that I, too, am a child of light, just as
they are. And yet, this is what I was told by the
Mejiro family.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: ("You needn't run. Observe from the sidelines.")

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Even dear Grandmother said as much. But even
for me...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(Spring came. The spring I yearned for arrived. I
entered Tracen Academy, and...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well then, Trainer. I look forward to working with
you from today onwards.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That is why... I would like you to guide me there.
Please, will you join me in welcoming the spring?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(All because I've happened upon a trainer who's
willing to guide me and walk beside me at my
pace.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: It's here... My true spring is finally about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's happening, Trainer. My long-awaited
debut in the Twinkle Series is set.
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's give it our all!
Yeah! Let's give it our all!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Absolutely. Um, pardon me, but I'm wondering...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When will I actually be able to participate in the
Twinkle Series itself?
choice_data_list: After your debut race, of course...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh? Well, yes, that does make sense. Very
well, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Henceforth, I shall commit every fiber of my
being to racing and do the Mejiro name proud.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My trainee is Mejiro Bright, an Umamusume from
the prestigious Mejiro family. But the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ah, what a wonderful day... La, la, laaa... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even for a pampered young lady, she's
extraordinarily laid-back. As well as being slow
out of the gate, she's also slow to take action
mid-race. That said...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... Once I hear the signal, I'll pick up the pace... I just need to be ready—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Pant... Right! Here... I go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Ever since I was a child—aaall this time—I've been disappointing those who have had high expectations of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
As an Umamusume of the Mejiro family, I ought
to be ashamed of myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I must become a new light for the Mejiro family!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not that she wants for drive or talent—she just
has trouble with adjusting to the flow and seizing
the moment to act.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I show her when to take action, she'll be able to
close the gaps—both on and off the racetrack...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to Mejiro Bright, another Mejiro is
debuting as her peer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
We've finally arrived, Bright. At long last, we've
reached the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober, welcome! And yes, we have indeed. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This Umamusume is Mejiro Dober. She's another
member of the Mejiro family and a composed
runner. On top of that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Oh, Bright's trainer... Hello...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's extremely shy and shows no signs of
warming up to me, even now that I'm Mejiro
Bright's trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Let's both do our best, Dober. Also...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's be sure to bring honor to the Mejiro name,
just as McQueen and Ryan have before us...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
...Whoa. I just dropped by to see how you were
doing, but... hearing you put me on a pedestal
like that—I'm blushing here.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But this is awesome, you guys—both of you
debuting in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And you must be Bright's trainer! Keep an eye on
her for me, 'kay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her name is Mejiro Ryan. Adored by Mejiro
Bright, she's one of the Mejiro family's exemplary
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As for what makes Mejiro Ryan so strong...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I really do strive to be like you, Ryan. If only I
could close in on the opposition with your force
and momentum...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Come to think of it, you always did like
the way I speed up on the last stretch, huh,
Bright?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, you should try that too! Knowing you,
you could probably pull it off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, Bright's got nice, long legs,
just like Ryan. Maybe Ryan's the one who inspired
her running style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mejiro family doesn't seem to have much
hope for Bright, but even so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Trainer. Let's move forward together,
hand in hand...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The sunlight shining through the foliage is ever so
bright. I may be in the shade now, but no matter
what, I shall become the light of the Mejiro
family!
